title: Life in Biblical Israel
author: Philip J. King; Lawrence E. Stager
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted monograph. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Synthesis of Israelite daily life and material culture: houses and construction, dress and textiles, food production, water systems, tools, and household organization. Primary anchor for material-culture claims (mudbrick construction, dress, wells, household scale).
confidenceNotes: Card seeded from team knowledge; page-level citations to be added during the citation verification pass (M1). 2026-07-16 citation-verification pass (fable-review-queue #13, Philistine headdress): attempted to page-verify this book's specific discussion of Philistine dress/headdress iconography via web search; found only tertiary paraphrases (non-scholarly clothing-reference sites) describing King & Stager's general content (leather cap, headband, ribbed corselet, kilt) without a checkable page citation, and no accessible full-text/preview to confirm pagination directly. Exact page number for the Philistine-headdress discussion remains TO VERIFY against a primary copy; the general summary content is plausible but not independently page-checked here. See newly added `yasur-landau-2012-feathered-helmets`, `stager-mountjoy-2007-ashkelon-krater`, and `master-2021-philistines-highlands` cards for citable secondary literature that does carry checkable venue/page-range detail on this question.
